channel.title: Accounting, Economics, and Law: A Convivium
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Accounting, Economics, and Law: A Convivium

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Akio Hoshi, Mioko Takahashi, Clémence Garcia DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ael-2025-frontmatters1
